title: xyris augusto-coburgii
intro: Xyris augusto-coburgii, also known as the Purple-eyed Grass or Augustus's Xyris, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Xyris augusto-coburgii have been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, fever reduction, and relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Xyris augusto-coburgii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by applying a topical cream or ointment made from the plant's extracts.
